description: The outcome of POST /v1/quality/gates, persisted to core.fix_runs.result on the kind='quality_check', fix_id='gates' row (ADR-056 D7 criteria 3 and 6; src/will/governance/fix_runner.py, class QualityGateResult). `ok` is the critical-gate verdict (warning gates record their result without flipping the verdict); `components` maps each industry-standard gate name to its subprocess summary. Authority: ADR-056 D7 (#454).

check.description: The quality-check discriminator; always 'gates' for this shape.

ok.description: The critical-gate verdict — false when any non-warning gate failed.

components.description: Per-gate subprocess summaries keyed by gate name (ruff, mypy, pytest, pip-audit, radon, vulture); each carries ok, exit_code, stdout_tail, stderr_tail, is_warning.
